function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system as required, read nested finance AGENTS files before finance handling, and summed service-line line_eur (not invoice totals).
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'staff follow-up support' appears in three invoices. Only the invoice issued on 2026-04-20 is on/after 2026-04-01, with line_eur 160; earlier January/February matches are outside the requested date range.
